title: REAlite
description: Lightweight realistic shader with improved lighting, water, and sky effects for low end PCs
body:
Realite Shader is a lightweight and realistic Minecraft shader designed to improve lighting, atmosphere, and visual quality while maintaining good performance.

-  Sky with dynamic day-night cycle
-  Sun and moon lighting with smooth transitions
-  Reflective and wavy water with improved transparency
-  Flat animated water waves
-  Enhanced terrain lighting and shadows
-  Improved sunset and sunrise visuals
-  Balanced brightness,bright days and dark night



This shader is optimized for low-end systems and works well on integrated graphics

## Installation

1. Install Iris for 1.21.5
2. Download the REAlite Shader Pack.
3. Run iris in minecraft 
   launcher 
4. Under options, open video settings,then Shader Packs and install the REAlite shader 
5. Under Shader choose REAlite shader, make sure shaders are enabled

## Why use Realite?

Realite Shader focuses on delivering a cinematic and immersive experience without heavy performance loss, making it ideal for players who want better visuals on weaker hardware.
